title: Personal User - download/install, Login with Gmail, not present on any Lens tenant
scenario: Personal user with paired headset logs in via Gmail during onboarding without prior Lens tenant invite; headset data appears correctly and user is not registered on any Lens tenant.
steps: 1. Ensure a personal user has a headset paired to their mobile device.
2. The user logs into the app using a Gmail account during onboarding.
3. Confirm that the user has NOT received any email invite from any Lens tenant for that Gmail account.
4. After login, verify that the headset appears in the app with correct data (image, settings).
5. Verify that the personal user is NOT registered on any Lens tenant.
expected: The headset appears in the app with correct data (image, settings), and the personal user is not registered on any Lens tenant.
